raw_output:
Codex security leg on fix/37-38-renames aa052b3: 'T-04: Export-template changes modify only static <td> label text. No interpolation, escaping, or HTML context changed; existing dynamic values remain numeric-formatted or _esc()-escaped. No new security surface: no new sinks, URLs, styles, scripts, or data flow. Non-security scope note: the diff is not literally strings-only — ConsistencyMeter removes title attributes, and onboarding adds a help paragraph. These are presentation/DOM changes, not security issues.' No findings.

--- Post-review delta ---
Fix round commit 7a77334: C1/Codex-P2 fixed (flex-wrap + row-gap on .consistency-pills and .report-consistency-pills); C2 fixed (analysis delta_7d label -> 'Bedtime Offset (7d avg)', rec copy aligned to 'your recent (7-day) average bedtime'; no tests pinned old strings — grepped); C3 fixed (hint now attributes correctly: bedtime target -> countdown/caffeine marker/consistency stats; wake target -> Auto display-mode schedule); C7 fixed (same corrected hint added to Settings ProfileSection with a .settings-field-hint class matching the Settings hint idiom); C6 fixed (cursor:help removed); C5 partially fixed (PLAN.md:446 user-facing copy example de-Greeked; internal Greek framing left). TOUCH-SET OVERFLOW RECORDED (ship Phase 3 gate): plan predicted frontend-only (ConsistencyMeter, SleepProfileStep, ProfileSection, weekly consistency card, tests); actual lane also touched backend stats_engine VARIABLE_LABELS + reference_data rec copy (the renames genuinely live there — plan's 'ONLY if frontend-side' assumption was wrong), report_service export template, PLAN.md/ARCHITECTURE.md lines, DashboardPage/ReportsPage/SettingsPage CSS. Recorded in the wave-2 report. Post-review commits also include: merge of origin/dev (clean; the shared-file composition with #140's stats_engine edits and #139's report_service edits is exercised by this PR's own CI at the attested hash) and docs/waves/2026-07-22-wave-2-report.md (ship Phase 5: the wave report rides the wave's final PR before attestation; by design it is not itself leg-reviewed). Post-fix verification: backend pytest 550 exit 0 (coverage 97.88%), mypy 0, ruff 0; frontend cold-cache lint 0, format:check 0, vitest 311/44 exit 0, build 0.

--- Post-review delta 2 ---
Report-only commit: milestone count corrected to 18 closed / 4 open (wave 2 closes #36/#134/#113/#37/#38 from the 13/9 wave-1 baseline). No code changed; hash re-attested at 95cbeb6e9ed4b81355335351d62c117a5dec2d2e40a7af114b6c9ce309e14b96.
